notes: Worker C1 reviewed EN batch for src/data/contracts.ts todo entries in source-order slice src/data/contracts.ts:160-719.

entries.gt_cb0f9f94dcba01: The NII sample window expects live zhelemish in a seal, without dust or foreign skin. Do not open the jar; a clean lump pays in containers and a stabilizer.
entries.gt_4008b18d5d52a0: The NII marker will specify the target after issue: mycelium, a wet cellar, or a procedural floor with mycelium.
entries.gt_7abd53cb0b2034: The house committee by the hermodoor wants the roster from the small emergency box before all-clear. Payment in coupons and a bandage; if the box is empty, the senior woman will go looking for people in the corridors.
entries.gt_5104abc695bc99: Living Zone: common corridor or shelter room; look for a public emergency box with a roster.
entries.gt_b3300f407cc0ce: Deliver two bottles of filtered water to the ration table. They will give bread and a coupon; do not show the water in the corridor.
entries.gt_a4a2587aad8cf6: Apartments: communal kitchen, ration queue, and belyak cauldron; better not flash water in the common corridor.
entries.gt_2f9df16f7d1d9a: Bring sealant to the wet sluice and step back until the second hum. Payment is water and a fuse; unauthorized work will flood the passage.
entries.gt_13706f7c3f66fe: Collectors: wet sluice, pump room, or tool cabinet near the overflow; keep to the dry edge, a second person holds the door.
entries.gt_be75e8b25e9a49: Deliver the dispatch to Major Gromny and do not get stuck at the wet fork. They pay in ammunition if the paper arrives before the patrol.
entries.gt_f07e8cbb0e158c: Collectors: Major Gromny's outpost; dry passages, communication pipes, patrol marks.
entries.gt_d1432713119e2b: Enter the card file and check whether the cabinets are still in place. A pass stub is paid for a mark before the cabinets start slamming doors on hands.
entries.gt_460a94f1a1b693: Ministry: archive card file, closed cabinets, and green accounting lamps.
entries.gt_7b0874a19c3f91: Kill the stamp-eater at the archive inventory. Do not carry extra forms: it smells stubs before blood. Payment is ammunition and a pass; the journals must stay intact.
entries.gt_6e2d7ff1d95409: Ministry: archive stacks and card file; keep distance from the paper maw.
entries.gt_e907ca8fd3b294: The quiet receiver expects the voice in a jar from the meat cache. Payment in holy water and antidep; do not answer the jar, even if it bargains with your voice.
entries.gt_1c773c87f466ed: Meat Lower: meat storage, cache by the threshold, or scorched guard post with a jar.
entries.gt_d4f47e80b9ffcb: Mark the protocol Void for the zero chancery. PSI dust is paid for a mark on the green wall and a route back.
entries.gt_71fdcad5828a2f: Void: green protocol passages; do not stand in the green line longer than a couple breaths.
entries.gt_03e6b4bfffe6cd: The sortie senior pays water and 9mm for a route with a return arrow. Without a path back, the guide will not come out for you; the sheet must stay dry.
entries.gt_bd41ee9096126f: Living Zone: map room, smoking room, or office desk with route paper; check that the sheet has a return arrow.
entries.gt_29e1d8252708ca: Dry Filter for the Long Run
entries.gt_14bee4503676a0: The guide by the hermodoor asks for a dry filter from the lower cache. Payment in water and shells; if the filter is wet, the sortie ended before the loot.
entries.gt_cee9866983cd94: Collectors: storage, dry pocket, or cabinet by the pump room; do not linger in water and do not put the filter next to wet cloth.
entries.gt_18698ff5d7436a: The hunting mark pays for Eyes at a lit passage. Break line of sight at a corner, do not stand under the light; clean work pays 9mm and a lamp.
entries.gt_b128af1440c841: Collectors or procedural passage: lamps, long line, and eye shot; close in after the volley, keep retreat open.
entries.gt_919c4cb34ff043: The stalker notch asks you to find a dry container after wet samosbor and place a mark. A key-label and coupons go to those who do not open it first.
entries.gt_32cc05d15acf53: Apartments: storeroom, common corridor, or dry box near a wet radiator; approach sideways and keep a path back.
entries.gt_3d7551a3fc4115: Bring the roster from the common emergency box before the siren. Payment is coupons and a bandage; the siren crosses out surnames faster than the house committee.
entries.gt_de9c4750e06f1d: Living Zone: common corridor, emergency box, or shelter room with extra surnames.
entries.gt_988f8100d5332a: Escort the List to the Doctor
entries.gt_eda2d9df7002ae: The sanitary table asks you to bring Olga a message about an opened quarantine cabinet. Payment in a sanitary kit; arrive while it is still a note, not an epidemic.
entries.gt_8c488efaf2771a: Living Zone: assembly hall and Olga's medpost.
entries.gt_8ec05b487689e2: Sergeant Barinov issues a sweep for a shadow in the residential passages: keep light up, do not shoot at runners. Payment is 9mm and water if the shadow does not choose a host first.
entries.gt_b4959c18e51de5: Living Zone: corridors between apartments and shelters.
entries.gt_9688a373959bdd: Bring the door kit to the torn OBZH opening. Payment is a gasket and a bandage; Nina will enter in the log whether you put the door on the gym or carried the kit home.
entries.gt_f3fccfcbee2a42: Living Zone: OBZH classroom and gym-shelter; look for the torn opening where Nina counts heads.
entries.gt_7d145a77f3443e: The parent committee at the door asks you to lead the OBZH group to the gym and Vadim Monitor. For a map and water, walk them slowly: one lost step later gets searched for by the whole log.
entries.gt_fea86c6277a28f: Living Zone: OBZH gym-shelter by the classroom; Vadim Monitor keeps the evacuation log.
entries.gt_e32a69f50259ea: Lead the Voice Away from the Door
entries.gt_f0d9704d565bde: The OBZH duty officer orders you to lure the beast away from the school opening and kill it in the corridor. Payment is 9mm and sealant; the children count to one hundred and do not answer the door.
entries.gt_a78d82426a5ce4: Living Zone: corridor by the OBZH classroom; do not stand at the peephole and draw noise away from the gym.
entries.gt_ace0e2690b6bf0: The elevator commission window pays for a bypass form from a ministry safe. Carry the paper quietly and before shift change; if you are late, the form goes to another contractor and the safe records an extra hand.
entries.gt_41af89cae1bf5b: Ministry: pass window, commission office, or a safe that likes the right hands.
entries.gt_a4a3ce3d8d3a5b: Remove the animated paragraph in the incoming offices. Keep a cabinet between you and the wording, close in after the volley: the target shoots text and rewrites pass owners.
entries.gt_62ee693d2f8f75: Ministry: archive offices where the text holds a line of fire.
entries.gt_85c3a5e3ad50ee: The inspection archive asks for a mark from the card file. Clearance requires checking the cabinets after samosbor and not becoming one more surname in the missing drawer.
entries.gt_6ca4a0b813f183: Ministry: archive card file and closed cabinets.
entries.gt_7ca3e034797d1f: Return the transparent NII sample with the seal intact. Payment in a stabilizer and certificate; the legal chain is poorer than the market.
entries.gt_464eaa5a4ea58d: Ministry: NII audit office, transparent sample cage behind a locked partition. Do not open: the value sits in the seal and clearance.
entries.gt_e4fc92b1ac08e0: Carry the leak manifest out of the NII audit office. Payment is a pass and 9mm; the paper must get out before the cabinets hide the address.
entries.gt_3935881eb62942: Ministry: NII audit office, sample safe, and write-off card file.
entries.gt_e897574e068601: Carry the transparent NII sample to market with the seal intact. The money is higher, and questions about the empty jar will no longer go to the seller.
entries.gt_d7d09c463d5b10: Ministry: NII audit office, locked transparent sample cage, and envelope without an invoice.
entries.gt_1858a7b6333428: The ration committee waits for a stamp pad from the apartment cash desk. Payment in water and bread; take it before the queue starts stamping with fists.
entries.gt_0d67c9fc160e2a: Apartments: communal kitchen, cash desk, or ration queue.
entries.gt_7b3b608ca9a5b8: The kitchen committee asks you to remove the unperson by the ration cauldron without a crush. For bandages and coupons, do not let the crowd decide that the patient one at the ladle means one of theirs.
entries.gt_0f2e8b0d42f095: Apartments: communal kitchen, concentrate cauldron, and crush at the rations.
entries.gt_9bf73a62734c42: Inspect the common corridor after the ration crush. Payment in water; count the living and the doors while the corridor is still common.
entries.gt_43d1d38bb23d32: Apartments: common corridor, red corner, or queue site.
entries.gt_2c4ba2c82cd2c0: Get the forged order from Dima in the print shop. Pay, buy a finished sheet, or carry it out quietly; noise will become an identity check.
entries.gt_ce407c0e9163c7: Apartments: Dima Pechatnik's illegal print shop. You need blank forms, money for a finished sheet, or quiet hands without witnesses.
entries.gt_3ba53a59a0ed4c: Brown Slime in the Dry Bypass
entries.gt_1715cee3a50e83: Scrape the brown slime in the dry bypass and bring the act. They pay coupons, a filter, and fuel; the sample can be turned in, burned, or sold.
entries.gt_f29e7826988e36: Collectors: dry bypass with toxic brown coating. The act and sample are in the room; the cleaning kit is quiet, the flamethrower is faster but burns gasoline.
entries.gt_6680be252f75ef: Take the green OVS sample and keep the jar away from food and cloth. Payment is containers and a filter; a second attempt costs more than the layer.
entries.gt_170528af3e22f6: Collectors: green OVS acid room. Take the filter layer from the table; keep the sample away from food and cloth.
entries.gt_d812bd7644ad75: Find the feeding tub where the slimevik takes food instead of blood. Approach with a filter and extra food or medicine; the job is to mark the sample, not arrange a hunt.
entries.gt_0e001163726d92: Collectors: slimevik feeding tub. The slimevik is neutral, but long contact without a filter cuts breath and PSI; barter with food or medicine marks the sample.
entries.gt_eaf38480acf994: Carry the white sample out of the locked sample room and do not study it around people. Seal intact means payment; voice shaking means retreat.
entries.gt_faccd2832dcc1b: Living Zone: Slime NII route post and locked white residue sample room. You need access to the box; do not open the sample or hold it under a lamp.
entries.gt_6893b07a56a77d: The lab office asks for a sealed blue sample from the collector. Do not open the ampoule: exposed light is filed as a burn, not a result.
entries.gt_53dadc814f3401: Collectors: blue glow cache, hermobox, and lamps around the sample. Take only an intact ampoule.
entries.gt_b6e355c2b7c6dc: The UV box technician demands a black sample from a false NII jar. First light and sealant, then the jar; if the residue blinked, this is no longer standard sampling.
entries.gt_1d1c73bb4a8205: Collectors: black slime anteroom and false NII jar. Prepare UV/light or a seal before taking the sample.
entries.gt_456a9dbdacd32c: The lab chief asks you to reach the flooded laboratory and mark why the log is wet on the inside. Inspection is required, not a brave hypothesis.
entries.gt_08943c4aa38738: Collectors: Professor Tesla's flooded laboratory. Check the devices, puddles, and the log by the workbench.
entries.gt_fff49997474f09: The clearance table asks for an inspection mirror from the NII field post. The commission checks the cabinet sideways: if the handle twitches, the mirror breaks before the face.
entries.gt_bca04049a46e58: NII Field Post: Containers and Responsibility
entries.gt_d8c9385262aaa3: Collectors: NII field post, container cabinet, and Sideways Table. The mirror is at the post, not in a sample jar.
entries.gt_b8b8e2b322e1fc: The field scientist asks for a seroburmalin sample from the Gray Watcher's bypass. Looking straight is forbidden: NII pays for a scrape, not an eye-loss report.
entries.gt_8721d3222df006: Void: Gray Watcher node. Take the lower bypass along the chalk marks, keep the source out of direct line, and collect the blind sample.
entries.gt_2ff18504aefa79: Bring the brown sample to the furnace and return the quenched residue. Payment in fuel; do not touch the market, the report after fire is shorter.
entries.gt_9399b69d385e8e: Collectors: the dry bypass gives the brown sample; the deactivation furnace gives quenched residue if you do not sell the sample to Senka.
entries.gt_117fe85c6400d8: Get the manometer, check the pressure drop, and close the pressure spike. Steam from the pipe means retreat, then a report for water and sealant.
entries.gt_a06848ff0a6599: Collectors: pump room, pressure post, or tool cabinet; check the valve before entering steam and do not stand in puddles by the panel.
entries.gt_8c1d1e28170475: The sluice duty officer marks an eel in the wet flight for clearing. Payment in harpoons; do not bring repairmen in before the signal, and fight in water only with a retreat path.
entries.gt_76d5afcc537bad: Collectors: wet flight, sluice, or pipe with an ambush; water cuts your step, the dry edge and bait win seconds.
entries.gt_4ad50fdc994eb4: The lift dispatcher gives a package to Major Gromny: patrol route, mark, return alive. They pay in ration and 7.62 if the paper arrives before the death notice.
entries.gt_4a40c8431760b2: Collectors: Major Gromny's outpost, wet communication pipes, and dry edge of the patrol.
entries.gt_6857feb7f6aa37: The NII field table accepts a brown sample only sealed. Payment in containers and water; they will open the jar at the commission, and responsibility starts immediately.
entries.gt_7f925aa9dfe1ff: Collectors: NII field post, container issue box, and sealed sample cabinet.
entries.gt_d2a3c642a8f6e5: Take the brown sample before the NII dispute. Payment is fuel and a filter; do not break the seal, do not put the jar on the floor.
entries.gt_fd3e0908f5e2a8: Collectors: NII post with a sampling log; the liquidator looks at the seal, not the hypothesis.
entries.gt_8d0409eb4c32bb: The quiet container buy-up buys the brown sample outside the log. Payment in forged stub and cigarettes; the market takes the risk, there are no witnesses.
entries.gt_43aa43effaffbe: Collectors: NII field post, where an extra sample quickly becomes someone else's proceeds.
entries.gt_27bcee3fa9714c: Bring Yakov Betonov's route after Z+22. Payment is PSI dust and a filter; he needs the lift diagram and an answer on whether the containers were opened.
entries.gt_fd8e618a4555f5: Living Zone: Yakov's laboratory. Return with Betonov's route; do not open suspicious containers in the lift.
entries.gt_bb15115b4382cf: The NII ministry intake demands Betonov's map with a Z+22 mark. Payment in pass and receipt; the map becomes evidence, the shift worker by the cabinet a line in the file.
entries.gt_abb15777f3ac05: Collectors: pneumomail sorting and wet cabinets after lift Z+22. Look for the map note, not the sample.
entries.gt_1d77bddf57f42c: Take Betonov's black sample to burning. They pay fuel and a filter; NII argues about value, the post argues about distance to fire.
entries.gt_f56ecf211fda78: Black Larva: Wet Click in the Sample
entries.gt_48b1f22c642559: Collectors: Black Larva chamber. Take UV, a seal, or fire; do not carry a raw jar through the smoking room.
entries.gt_86e4d483215d5a: Burnt accounting asks for a mark from the meat threshold. For holy water, enter, count the marks on the jamb, and leave before the second roll call: after it, the cult post closes retreat.
entries.gt_e0fbddf1eb13c5: Meat Lower: Heralds' threshold, cult post, and passages with marks on the doorjambs.
entries.gt_1b0a9fbf5c229f: The threshold candle promises a stabilizer for a Herald without protocol. Kill him, take the mark, and return before the patrol, or the cultists will hang your surname at the entrance.
entries.gt_b5989c6da339d8: Meat Lower: Heralds' threshold, narrow corridors, and a post where they record the names of entrants.
entries.gt_8ce0ded4d3d4f7: The cult receiver waits for the voice in a jar from the lower store. Payment in a meat rune and antidep; do not open the jar or listen at your ear, or the receiver will lower the price for a damaged seal.
entries.gt_d8112b50bffd88: Meat Lower: cache by the cult storehouse or threshold.
